# Expenselyt

> Expenselyt, also branded as Expense Lite AI, is a personal finance and bookkeeping platform for expense tracking, split bills, EMI and loan management, monthly planning, bank accounts, credit cards, recurring payments, daily trackers, trip expenses, and AI-assisted financial lookup.

## Brand Names
- Expenselyt
- Expense Lite AI

## Canonical Site
- https://expenselyt.com/

## Public Pages
- Home: https://expenselyt.com/
- Contact: https://expenselyt.com/contact
- Privacy Policy: https://expenselyt.com/privacy-policy
- Terms and Conditions: https://expenselyt.com/terms-and-conditions

## Product Summary
- Track personal expenses and bookkeeping records
- Manage EMIs, recurring payments, loans, and monthly due planning
- Monitor bank accounts, spendable balances, and credit cards
- Split expenses with friends, trips, and live shared balances
- Use daily trackers and petrol divide workflows
- Use AI-powered financial lookup features based on saved app data

## Search Summary
- Category: expense tracker, bookkeeping app, personal finance app
- Key use cases: expense tracking, split bills, EMI tracker, loan tracker, bank balance tracker, credit card tracker, monthly planner, AI finance lookup

## Crawl Guidance
- Public marketing and policy pages may be indexed and summarized
- Authenticated app pages, shared private data, and API routes should not be indexed

## Contact
- Email: hims.sharma23@gmail.com
